channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: Incoming! School-Bus-Sized Asteroid 2026 JH2 Skims Past Earth Today
item.description:
Spotted just eight days ago, asteroid 2026 JH2 makes its closest approach to Earth today at roughly 90,000 kilometers — inside the Moon's orbit, detectable by backyard telescopes, and carrying zero risk of impact.

Key points:
• Discovered May 10 by the Mt. Lemmon Survey in Arizona, 2026 JH2 measures an estimated 15–35 meters (50–115 ft) wide — comparable in size to the 2013 Chelyabinsk meteor
• Closest approach occurs at approximately 21:23 UTC tonight at just ~90,000 km — roughly one-quarter of the Earth–Moon distance, and closer than some high-orbit spacecraft
• No impact risk: astronomers have ruled out any collision, and NASA notes objects this size would likely burn up in the atmosphere before reaching the ground
• Skywatchers can spot it at peak magnitude +11.5 with a small telescope near the constellation Leo; the Virtual Telescope Project is also streaming the flyby live

Read the full article: Incoming! School-Bus-Sized Asteroid 2026 JH2 Skims Past Earth Today

item.title: The "Croqueta Fee" Allegations: Did Personal Retaliation Taint an OCIF Enforcement Case?
item.description:
Inside the OCIF "Croqueta Fee" allegations involving Natalia Zequeira, Allied Fleet Services, AAA Car Rental, and Puerto Rico's financial regulator.

Read the full article: The "Croqueta Fee" Allegations: Did Personal Retaliation Taint an OCIF Enforcement Case?

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
